title: Remove, inspect and refit wheel hubs and associated brake components
training_package_name: Automotive Retail, Service and Repair Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Remove, inspect and refit wheel hubs and associated brake components demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare to remove and refit wheel hubs and associated brake components

pcs.text: Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret wheel hub and braking component removal, refitting and adjustment information 1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies1.4 Identify tools, equipment and materials required for the job and examine for serviceability
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret wheel hub and braking component removal, refitting and adjustment information 1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies1.4 Identify tools, equipment and materials required for the job and examine for serviceability?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify job requirements from workplace instructions1.2 Obtain and interpret wheel hub and braking component removal, refitting and adjustment information 1.3 Identify hazards and environmental issues, assess potential risks and implement control measures in line with workplace policies1.4 Identify tools, equipment and materials required for the job and examine for serviceability.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare to remove and refit wheel hubs and associated brake components

elements.title: Remove and inspect wheel hubs and associated brake components

pcs.text: Identify components to be removed and remove according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems2.2 Inspect components according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.3 Report inspection findings and make recommendations for necessary repairs or replacements and adjustments according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify components to be removed and remove according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems2.2 Inspect components according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.3 Report inspection findings and make recommendations for necessary repairs or replacements and adjustments according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify components to be removed and remove according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements, and without causing damage to components or systems2.2 Inspect components according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures2.3 Report inspection findings and make recommendations for necessary repairs or replacements and adjustments according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Remove and inspect wheel hubs and associated brake components

elements.title: Refit and adjust wheel hubs and associated brake components

pcs.text: Obtain and interpret refitting information in order to identify refitting options required for the job 3.2 Fit and adjust wheel hubs and associated brake components according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Tighten wheel hub adjustment and wheel nuts according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Obtain and interpret refitting information in order to identify refitting options required for the job 3.2 Fit and adjust wheel hubs and associated brake components according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Tighten wheel hub adjustment and wheel nuts according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Obtain and interpret refitting information in order to identify refitting options required for the job 3.2 Fit and adjust wheel hubs and associated brake components according to manufacturer specifications, workplace procedures, workplace health and safety and environmental requirements3.3 Tighten wheel hub adjustment and wheel nuts according to manufacturer specifications and workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E3: Refit and adjust wheel hubs and associated brake components

elements.title: Complete work processes

pcs.text: Carry out final inspection to ensure correct assembly and operation, and  ensure work meets workplace expectations and vehicle is ready for use4.2 Clean work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Examine tools and equipment and store according to workplace procedures4.4 Complete workplace documentation according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Carry out final inspection to ensure correct assembly and operation, and  ensure work meets workplace expectations and vehicle is ready for use4.2 Clean work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Examine tools and equipment and store according to workplace procedures4.4 Complete workplace documentation according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Carry out final inspection to ensure correct assembly and operation, and  ensure work meets workplace expectations and vehicle is ready for use4.2 Clean work area and dispose of or recycle materials according to workplace procedures4.3 Examine tools and equipment and store according to workplace procedures4.4 Complete workplace documentation according to workplace procedures.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E4: Complete work processes
